title: age-group — declared entitlements
description: Three entitlement keys. `age_group_slot` caps the number of tenant-custom (is_seeded=false) age groups per tenant. `age_group_custom` gates the ability to create any custom age group at all (Small tier locked to the seeded catalog). `age_group_sport_specific` gates the `sport_key` column — sport-specific overrides are Enterprise-only.

entitlements.description: Enables creating custom (is_seeded=false) age groups. Off (Small tier) = the tenant is locked to the 10-entry seeded catalog; POST /api/v1/age-groups returns AGE_GROUP_CUSTOM_DISABLED (402). Seeded rows may still be edited (renamed, recoloured, sort_order adjusted), but the bounds + cutoff + sport_key of a seeded row also refuse mutation on Small tier (the whole customisation surface is off, not just create). Medium + Enterprise carry this flag by default. Rationale: Small tier is designed for small academies that don't need to reshape the youth-development age progression.

Max number of CUSTOM (is_seeded=false) age groups per tenant. Small=0 (no customs — the seeded catalog IS the ceiling). Medium=20. Enterprise=unlimited (null). Consumed on create when is_seeded=false. The seeded default catalog (10 rows) does NOT consume slots — they are a platform invariant. Refuses further customs with AGE_GROUP_QUOTA_EXCEEDED (402) once exhausted. Downgrading (Medium → Small) does NOT auto-archive existing customs — the reconciler surfaces the drift + suggests manual archive. The observer returns the slot on hard-delete (soft-delete keeps the slot occupied per retention).

Enables the `sport_key` field on AgeGroup rows. Off = sport_key must be NULL (all age groups are generic — U12 means U12 regardless of sport). On = tenants may create sport-specific overrides (e.g. football U12 with a Jan 1 European federation cutoff vs generic U12 with a rolling birthday). Enterprise-only because sport-specific rules add complexity to every downstream resolver — most tenants don't need it. When off, POST + PATCH with a non-null sport_key return AGE_GROUP_SPORT_SPECIFIC_DISABLED (402).
